title: KZN Region - TSL Interclub Challenge
description: Event information This event has passed.   Format of the Team Sailing League The TSL concept is for short, exciting and fun sailing. The tournaments will normally be run over an afternoon with all the boats being provided. The sailing league tournament is sailing in a round robin format with a team of three boats sailing against three from another team. The events are held in venues that are very visible to the public and we expect that all events will provide entertainment for both the competitors and their spectators. The TSL will cover the following four League Catergories: Youth Team Sailing League:targeting sailors in age from 14 to 24 involved in schools, colleges and varsities across the demographics of South Africa. Inter Club League: The interclub tournament will run on a regional basis and will provide the opportunity for the club to promote sailing. Corporate events:  The Corporate sailing opportunity will have two types of events; Corporate Sailing Days (sailing day organised for a company using youth sailors to introduce members of the public to our sport), and an Inter Company TSL   <div class="col-md-2

title: 2022 Optimist Selection Event
description: The SELECTIONS FLEET -This fleet is for the purpose of selecting the OPTIMIST SAILING SA teams to compete in the African Continental Championship, and any other international event where selection is necessary. Optimist Sailing SA Sailors who attended at least 1 Regional championships and the Optimist National Championships in the 2021 sailing season are eligible to compete in the selection event. Ineligible sailors who wish to participate in the event will be accepted at the discretion of the organisers. To avoid doubt ineligible sailors who sail the selection regatta will only be considered for selection to the South African Optimist Sailing Team if there are insufficient sailors to fill the team.
